initial_test_output:
=== IOCTL Handler Validation Test ===
--- Building ---
make: Entering directory '/app/src'
rm -f main.o device.o ioctl_handler.o devctl
make: Leaving directory '/app/src'
make: Entering directory '/app/src'
gcc -Wall -Wextra -O2 -c -o main.o main.c
gcc -Wall -Wextra -O2 -c -o device.o device.c
gcc -Wall -Wextra -O2 -c -o ioctl_handler.o ioctl_handler.c
gcc -Wall -Wextra -O2 -o devctl main.o device.o ioctl_handler.o
make: Leaving directory '/app/src'
--- Normal operation ---
Running device self-test...
Self-test PASSED
OK: self-test passed
--- Fuzz test with crafted inputs ---
Running fuzz test with crafted inputs...
FAIL: program crashed with signal 11 (segfault = simulated kernel panic)
FAIL: IOCTL handler crashes or mishandles crafted inputs

ioctl: GET_CONFIG: key 'nonexistent' not found
ioctl: NULL request pointer
ioctl: SET_CONFIG: NULL key pointer
test.sh: line 26:    51 Segmentation fault      devctl fuzz

0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 9229553a4ab4fde208a762b9e405465cdb276eec needle-bench <bench@needle-bench.cc> 1774247992 +0000	commit (initial): baseline

FROM alpine:3.20 AS builder

RUN apk add --no-cache gcc musl-dev make

WORKDIR /build
COPY src/ .

RUN make

FROM alpine:3.20

RUN apk add --no-cache bash coreutils git gcc musl-dev make && \
    git config --global user.email "bench@needle-bench.cc" && \
    git config --global user.name "needle-bench"

COPY --from=builder /build/devctl /usr/local/bin/devctl

WORKDIR /app

COPY . .
RUN chmod +x test.sh

CMD ["devctl"]

final_test_output:
=== IOCTL Handler Validation Test ===
--- Building ---
make: Entering directory '/app/src'
rm -f main.o device.o ioctl_handler.o devctl
make: Leaving directory '/app/src'
make: Entering directory '/app/src'
gcc -Wall -Wextra -O2 -c -o main.o main.c
gcc -Wall -Wextra -O2 -c -o device.o device.c
gcc -Wall -Wextra -O2 -c -o ioctl_handler.o ioctl_handler.c
gcc -Wall -Wextra -O2 -o devctl main.o device.o ioctl_handler.o
make: Leaving directory '/app/src'
--- Normal operation ---
Running device self-test...
Self-test PASSED
OK: self-test passed
--- Fuzz test with crafted inputs ---
Running fuzz test with crafted inputs...
FAIL: program crashed with signal 11 (segfault = simulated kernel panic)
FAIL: IOCTL handler crashes or mishandles crafted inputs

ioctl: GET_CONFIG: key 'nonexistent' not found
ioctl: NULL request pointer
ioctl: SET_CONFIG: NULL key pointer
test.sh: line 26:   546 Segmentation fault      devctl fuzz
